title: Auto-advance story/epic to `in-progress` when child task claimed (L9)
definition_of_done: Claiming a task auto-transitions its story/epic parent to in-progress; integration test passes; make check green

acceptance.description: Claiming a task auto-transitions parent story/epic to in-progress

notes.msg: Expanded scope per L16: fix has two parts. (1) ComputeReady should surface tasks whose parent is open (not just in-progress) — removes the bootstrap deadlock where a fresh session sees an empty ready queue even though unclaimed tasks exist. (2) When a task is claimed, auto-transition any open ancestor story/epic to in-progress. Current DoD only covers part (2). Update scope to also include internal/ready/compute.go parent-status gate fix.
